jd_text: Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development. Operating in 100 countries, Egis puts the expertise of its 19,500 employees at the service of its clients and develops cutting-edge innovations accessible to all projects. Through its wide range of activities, Egis is a key player in the collective organisation of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world. With 3,500 employees across 8 countries in the Middle East, Egis has delivered over 700 complex development projects, stimulating economic growth and enhancing quality of life. Ranked among the top ten firms in the Middle East by Engineering News Record (ENR), Egis is committed to sustainable development. The Group’s operations in the Middle East are built on strategic acquisitions and a deep understanding of local market conditions. Egis has long history of providing comprehensive engineering, consulting, and project management services makes it a trusted partner for regional governments, investors, and developers. Job Description We are seeking a visionary and decisive Program Director in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. As the Program Director, you will be responsible for overseeing and managing all aspects of our airport programs, ensuring efficient operations, and driving strategic initiatives to enhance the overall airport experience. Develop and implement comprehensive airport programs and strategies aligned with organizational goals and objectives Lead and motivate cross-functional teams to achieve program milestones and deliverables Manage multiple complex projects simultaneously, ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards Collaborate with stakeholders, including government agencies, airlines, and service providers, to optimize airport operations and enhance customer satisfaction Oversee budget planning, allocation, and financial management for all airport programs Identify and mitigate potential risks and challenges to program success Develop and maintain key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure program effectiveness and drive continuous improvement Ensure compliance with local and international aviation regulations and safety standards Present regular progress reports and updates to senior management and key stakeholders Stay abreast of industry trends and best practices to implement innovative solutions and drive operational excellence Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Engineering, or related field; Master's degree preferred Minimum 20+ years of experience in airport operations or management, with a proven track record of successful program implementation in GCC Demonstrated experience in leading large-scale projects or programs in an airport environment Strong project management skills with PMP certification or equivalent preferred Excellent strategic planning and execution abilities Proficient in budgeting, financial management, and resource allocation Advanced stakeholder management and communication skills Exceptional problem-solving and decision-making capabilities In-depth knowledge of airport operations, regulations, and international aviation standards Understanding of aviation industry trends and best practices Strong leadership and team management skills Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English; knowledge of Arabic is a plus Willingness to relocate to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
